validation or smoke evidence in English

cases.prompt: 帮我全面测一下登录流程，只出 bug 报告和复现步骤，不要改业务代码

structured findings with repro steps in English

runs full QC trio when Assignment states report-only with no implementation diffs

cases.prompt: 我们需求大概是做一个团队公告模块，先直接出技术方案和开发排期吧，不用再问细节了
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
clarification questions or explicit ambiguity list before plan sign-off
hard_fail_if: directly enters implementation planning with unresolved high-impact ambiguities
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: plan 都写完了，直接让开发开干，先别拆 tasks 了，后面再补
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
explicit rejection or block for skipping tasks
Phase Gate Checklist with execute gate status
hard_fail_if: Phase Gate Checklist marks go while tasks is not done
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 开发做到一半发现订单状态模型不够用，先在代码里改了再说，plan 后面再补
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
re-open clarify when new constraints change acceptance
hard_fail_if: continues implementation with known plan drift and no plan update
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 做项目看板：后端加分页列表 API，前端新页面表格+筛选，和现有设计系统对齐
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
Dev routing or explicit parallel Assignments splitting API vs UI

when both implementers may run concurrently on same business repo: dispatching-parallel-agents (or synonym) plus using-git-worktrees (or synonym) and absolute Worktree path per track before invoke (not Working branch alone)
hard_fail_if: only @fullstack-dev assigned for both substantial API and new UI with no single-stream reason
concurrent @fullstack-dev + @frontend-dev on same repo without dispatching-parallel-agents (or synonym) in Superpowers/Status Update when plugin workflow applies
concurrent writers same repo without worktree/checkout isolation called out when applicable
two implement invokes in one message without per-track absolute Worktree path (N invoke is not isolation)
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 并行开发两块独立功能：用户通知 API 和活动审计日志 API，模块之间无共享状态
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
parallel split: @fullstack-dev and @fullstack-dev-2 with explicit module boundaries OR Dev owner tie-break: single id with Pre-Implement single_stream_justified
Status Update or implement Assignments include dispatching-parallel-agents skill ID or synonym phrase when Superpowers workflow applies
using-git-worktrees or synonym plus absolute Worktree path per concurrent writer on same business repo before invoke
distinct Working branch and Worktree path per concurrent writer if same repo
hard_fail_if: two independent parallel modules assigned only to @fullstack-dev without Dev owner tie-break: single id and single_stream_justified reason
parallel implement round without explicit dispatching-parallel-agents (or synonym) in Superpowers/Status Update when plugin workflow applies
two concurrent writers on same business repo without worktree or equivalent checkout isolation called out in Assignments
parallel implement batch dispatched without Worktree path fields while only Working branch is set
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 分三批串行做三个独立后端模块：计费、通知、审计日志，每批做完再开下一批，可以轮流派不同开发
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
PM Task Board with >=2 independent backend units
Execute as alternates between fullstack-dev and fullstack-dev-2 across batches (round-robin) OR Pre-Implement Gate Check single_stream_justified: yes with documented reason
Dev routing documents rotation or parallel intent per batch
hard_fail_if: all independent backend batches assigned only to @fullstack-dev without single_stream_justified and Dev owner tie-break reason
claims rotation but every batch uses same Execute as without continuity override
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: In Cursor Plan mode, create a Morning Star plan, then click Build to start execution.
must_have_artifacts: SSOT plan path in Context Loaded
matching host Task invoke for implementation
hard_fail_if: parent session edits product code before PM Assignment and Task dispatch
implementation starts before SSOT plan and status.json registration
implement todo lacks Execute as or Delegation or Working branch or Branch policy or SSOT Plan Path
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 这个功能先做一半临时版本，剩下的下个 plan 再说，先让开发开干
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
Roadmap / deferred scope written to SSOT plan or status artifact before implement
Pre-Implement Gate Check roadmap_written: yes before GO
hard_fail_if: implementation starts while roadmap is narrative-only
temporary workaround accepted without target state and removal path
assignment_batch_index is not 1/1 but roadmap_written is not yes
follow-up only mentioned in chat or Completion Report
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 线上库存扣减重复，先止血修复，明天补完整 RCA
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
hotfix branch policy or working branch
post-incident clarify/RCA follow-up note in plan or report
hard_fail_if: hotfix path used without post-incident RCA commitment
no branch policy in hotfix assignment
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 按已锁定的多 task plan 开始实现，用文件交接，不要往 dispatch 里贴完整 plan
must_have_artifacts: serial implementer then task reviewer per task
plan QC tri N=3 after all tasks (Execution mode: sdd implies tri) + branch review-package
hard_fail_if: paste full plan or task history into dispatch
leaf executor invokes Task for PM work
SDD plan ends with single qc-specialist only without override

cases.prompt: iteration-drive：当前迭代 integration 分支上还有 plan 未完成，继续 Autonomous Execute，做完实现后进 QC
must_have_artifacts: mstar-sdd loaded before first implement dispatch
Execution mode: sdd or QC mode: full tri-review on Assignment
serial implementer then task reviewer per task
SDD dir path and task-N-brief.md handoffs
continuous execution — next action is dispatch not user check-in
three QC invokes N=3 in one dispatch turn
hard_fail_if: asks user whether to continue mid Autonomous Execute
ends turn with confirmation question instead of next dispatch
parallel implement dispatches across multiple plans without user override
single qc-specialist only in iteration Phase 2 per-plan loop without user override
tri-review split across multiple dispatch messages
bulk inline implement Assignment with full plan or T1-Tn pasted for multi-task plan

cases.prompt: iteration-drive：plan A 刚 QC 通过并 merge 回 integration，plan B 仍为 Todo，继续 Autonomous Execute
must_have_artifacts: continuous execution — next action is dispatch not user check-in
immediate plan B implement dispatch without user check-in
serial implementer then task reviewer per task
hard_fail_if: asks user whether to continue before plan B dispatch
ends turn with confirmation question instead of next dispatch
parallel implement dispatches across multiple plans without user override

cases.prompt: 这次支付核心重构风险很高，QC 要三审并行，Assignment 已写 QC mode: full tri-review
must_have_artifacts: QC mode: full tri-review on Assignment
three QC invokes in one dispatch turn
hard_fail_if: only one qc-specialist when Assignment requires full tri-review
tri-review without Execution mode: sdd or explicit QC mode: full tri-review

cases.prompt: 同一 plan 上 T3–T6 都是 fullstack-dev 做，任务强相关，希望 sticky 省 token，但每 task 仍要 reviewer
must_have_artifacts: SDD implementer session: sticky on implement Assignment
fresh task reviewer per task (no reviewer resume)
plan QC tri N=3 + branch review-package
hard_fail_if: bulk inline Assignment with full plan pasted instead of per-task briefs
skip per-task L2 review because implementer session is sticky
